current_run.description: A problem to find a secret integer N-bit number by querying a non-linear oracle that combines bitwise sum and product operations. The oracle computes f(x) = ( (x_1 + x_2 + ... + x_N) mod 2 ) XOR ( (x_1 * x_2 * ... * x_N) mod 2 ). This problem is novel as it combines two distinct non-linear operations (parity of sum and parity of product) in a single oracle.
